Revenue

Month over month movement, conversion delta, enterprise cohort growth, and retention variance.

Regional contribution stays split between self-serve and sales-led expansion.

Finance tagged this panel as one of the two primary executive views.

Activation

Signup completion, first-value time, and drop-off analysis across the new onboarding experiment.

Support saw fewer setup tickets while product noticed slower first-value time.

This panel competes directly with Revenue for equal attention in the dashboard.

Support load

Median response time, top issue categories, and open-ticket heatmap.

Weekday spikes align with setup incidents and migration questions.

The widget reads like a separate operational surface, not one article section.

Experiment notes

Analyst commentary, launch blockers, and rollout observations for the current quarter.

Stakeholders use this panel alongside the other metrics, not beneath them.

Clean mode should reject the whole grid instead of choosing one panel arbitrarily.
